creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
There appears to be a size mismatch in the 'audio/espeak' port.

Output from attempted build:

/usr/ports/audio/espeak $ sudo make
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
=> espeak-1.44.05-source.zip doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.

Fix: 

Probably create a new checksum for the distro
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to build the port.
